title: Influencer
author: Joseph Grenny, Kerry Patterson et al.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 6 concentric rings (the six sources of influence). The OUTERMOST is RED (Personal Motivation). The center is ash. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="500" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="420" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="340" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="260" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="180" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Whisper labels for each ring -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">
      <text x="0" y="-460" text-anchor="middle">1 · PERSONAL MOTIVATION</text>
      <text x="0" y="-380" text-anchor="middle">2 · PERSONAL ABILITY</text>
      <text x="0" y="-300" text-anchor="middle">3 · SOCIAL MOTIVATION</text>
      <text x="0" y="-220" text-anchor="middle">4 · SOCIAL ABILITY</text>
      <text x="0" y="-140" text-anchor="middle">5 · STRUCTURAL MOTIVATION</text>
      <text x="0" y="-60" text-anchor="middle">6 · STRUCTURAL ABILITY</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The CORE label inside the red center -->
    <text x="0" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.06em">CHANGE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Six concentric rings = the six sources of influence. The center is the red core: CHANGE. The title is in the middle of the rings. 380px weight-500 title centered — bold, because the word IS the book.
